metadata.description: Native local-memory plugins for Claude Code.

plugins.name: cortex
plugins.description: Native Zig Cortex memory server for Claude Code. Provides local JSONL memory, Markdown wiki pages, checkpoint save/restore, lifecycle hooks, and an MCP JSON-RPC tool catalog from a single native binary.
plugins.runtime_notes: Builds and runs as a native Zig binary. Data stays local under the configured Cortex home directory.
